name: Equipment Malfunctions Near Certain Locations
content: Instruments and equipment behave strangely near certain locations: compasses drift, radio reception distorts, photographic plates fog unexpectedly, engines stutter. Each malfunction is individually explainable — magnetic anomalies, atmospheric interference, equipment fatigue. Together they form a pattern that becomes visible in Session 2: the malfunctions cluster around five-pointed structures and Elder Thing artifacts. This is Stratum II bleeding into Stratum I — the residual energy or technology of the Elder Things still active after millions of years, interfering with human instruments.
notes: Stratum II bleeding into I. Elder Thing technology still active. Electrical/magnetic interference near five-pointed formations. Each anomaly individually explainable — together they form an impossible pattern.
